Mentor Bio

Mentor profile and gratitude.

Add mentor photo here (recommended: 1000×1200+).
File suggestion: assets/img/mentor.jpg

Leo Hoarty

Earth Biometrics · Enterprise Neurosystem

Bio

Leo Hoarty is a professional engineer with over 35 years of experience in both electronics engineering and computer science. He holds thirty-seven granted US patents in many areas of technology. He has considerable experience in the development of all levels of complex software systems as well as designing and bringing electronic hardware products to market.

Mentor

Mentor Bio

Mentor profile and professional background.

Industry mentor supporting technical growth through engineering perspective and feedback.

Updated: March 2026
Mentor portrait placeholder until approved photo is published.

Leo Hoarty

Earth Biometrics | Enterprise Neurosystem

Professional Background

Leo Hoarty is an engineer with more than 35 years of experience across electronics engineering and computer science. His record includes dozens of granted US patents across multiple technology domains.

His work spans full-stack software development, embedded and hardware product design, and productization of complex technical systems.
